title: Mass emails from mirrored email colum
excerpt: Pleas add a feature for me to send mass emails from mirrored emails columns. This would be way more efficient.

posts.author: KiaraBarnard (Kiara)
posts.cookedHtml: Pleas add a feature for me to send mass emails from mirrored emails columns. This would be way more efficient.

posts.author: nadya.shmidt (Nadya Shmidt)
posts.cookedHtml:
100%!
To organize mass emailing, I use the column “Mailing tags” assigned to the companies, and then mirror it to my contacts book. But it is not convenient at all
